heading_content_part: Privacy PolicyLastupdated April 26, 2023.Yourprivacy is very important to us. This Privacy Policy (the“Policy”) explains howwe collect, use, protect, and disclose information from you when using theApps under our developer account Ryzenrise. This Privacy Policy also explains your choices for managing yourinformation preferences. To comprehend our information usage practices, it isimportant that you carefully go through the following contents. Your use of the
application implies that you accept this Privacy Policy. In case you disagreewith any condition mentioned in this policy, kindly refrain from using ourservices.
Information We Collect

UsageInformationTheApps may collect information on your usage, such as the actions you take,downloads, shares, issues faced, photo or video editing, and any other data youprovide while using our Services. This data is collected to facilitate thefunctionality of the Apps.
LocationToprovide personalized content, we collect information about your approximatelocation, including location information based on your SIM card and/or IPaddress.

Deviceand log informationToensure a seamless and secure experience while using our Services via the Apps,and to enhance your user and advertisement experience, we collect your deviceand log information, which includes unique device identifiers, MAC address,GUID, device model, system language, country, advertising identifier, operatingsystem, system version number, IP address, software version number, accessnetwork, network quality data, and service log information.
How We Collect Information

heading_content_part: Onthe other hand, we passively gather information through tracking tools such asGoogle Firebase Analytics, Google Admob, and Meta, which allow us to collectdata on your usage of our Apps.

How We Use InformationGenerally,we use information to improve our Services. Specifically, we use in generating,advancing, executing, providing, and enhancing our Services. To illustrate, wemay analyze usage patterns to ensure that the Apps is user-friendly..ServiceProviders.Fromtime to time, we may establish a business relationship with other businessesthat we believe are trustworthy and who have confirmed that their privacypractices are consistent with ours ("

Service Providers"). Forexample, we may contract with Service Providers to provide certain services,such as customer support, analystics, and data storage and management. Weprovide our Service Providers with only the information necessary for them toperform these services on our behalf. Each Service Provider must agree to usereasonable security procedures and practices, appropriate to the nature of theinformation involved, in order to protect your information from unauthorized
access, use or disclosure. Service Providers are prohibited from using yourinformation other than as specified by us.
Advertisingpartners.Ouradvertising associates could gather data from your device to exhibitadvertisements on the Apps if third-party cookies and other tracking tools areemployed.

OtherTransfers.Wemay share your information with businesses controlling, controlled by, or undercommon control with us. If our company is merged, acquired, or sold, or in theevent of a transfer of some or all of our assets, we may disclose or transfer yourinformation in connection with such transaction. You will have the opportunityto opt out of any such transfer if, in our discretion, the new entity plans tohandle your information in a way that differs materially from this PrivacyPolicy.

decoder_heading: Storage and Retention of Your Information
ident_heading: Storage and Retention of Your Information
heading_content_part: Storage and Retention of Your Information

Storageof Your InformationYourinformation may be transferred to and stored at a location within or outsideyour country for the purposes described in the Policy. By submitting yourinformation, you consent to this transfer, storage, or processing. We will takereasonable steps to secure and treat your information in accordance with thePolicy and applicable laws.

Retentionof Your InformationAsa general rule, we will keep your personal information for as long as it isneeded to provide our Services, fulfill the original purpose for which wecollected it, or for other business reasons such as meeting legal requirements,resolving disputes, and enforcing our agreements. Some types of data must bekept for a certain period of time by law (such as the statute of limitations).If your personal information is no longer necessary for legal or business
purposes, we will typically delete or make it anonymous.

Your choices and rightsBy adjusting your in-app settings, you canregulate your usage of the Apps, including determining whether or not you wishto view particular types of advertisements. You may also be entitled to certainrights under the laws of your country, such as the ability to access and deleteyour data, among other things. If you require assistance in utilizing thesesettings or have any inquiries regarding your rights with respect to your
personal data in your country of residence, please feel free to contact us atryzengchang@gmail.com

SecurityWe'revery concerned about safeguarding the confidentiality of your information. Weemploy measures designed to protect your information from unauthorized access.However, no data transmission over the Internet or other network can beguaranteed to be 100% secure. As a result, while we strive to protectinformation transmitted on or through the application, we cannot and do notguarantee the security of any information you transmit on or through theapplication, and you do so at your own risk.

Children's PrivacyWedo not knowingly collect Personal Information from children under the age of13. By using our Site or Services, you promise that you are at least 13 yearsold. If we become aware that we have inadvertently received PersonalInformation from a child under the age of 13, we will delete such informationfrom our records. In addition, we recommend that minors 13 years of age orolder ask their parents for permission before sending any information aboutthemselves to anyone over the Internet.
Contact UsIf you have any questions or concernsregarding privacy using the application, please send us a detailed messagetoryzengchang@gmail.com. We will make every effortto resolve your concerns.
